hero.title: Diiwaangeli shil adoonin waraaq, adoonin jahwareer.
hero.subtitle: boom.contact waxay ku hagi doontaa talaabo talaabo si aad u ururiso macluumaadka muhiimka ah, ku darto sawirro, goob, bayaanno iyo saxiixyo, ka dibna soo saarto fayl PDF ah oo waqtiga lagu xusay si aad ugu dirto caymiskaaga.

landing.subtitle: Warbixin dhijitaal ah oo 5 daqiiqo gudahood. OCR caalami, QR code la wadaago, PDF adduunka si degdeg.

steps.title: Scan dukumiintadaada
steps.desc: Sawir ka qaad ruqsaddaada iyo kaardhka caymiska. OCR si toos ah u shaqeeyaa.

steps.title: La wadaag QR code
steps.desc: Darawalka kale scan QR garees. Xulasho waqtiga dhabta ah oo la wadaago.

steps.title: Buuxi foomka
steps.desc: Foomka caalamiga ah ee OCR uga buuxinaya. Xaqiiji oo tilmaan xaaladaha.

steps.title: Goobaha xadeynta
steps.desc: Riix 18-zone ee sawirka si aad u tilmaanto xadeynta.

steps.title: Saxeex oo dir
steps.desc: Laba saxeex dhijitaal ah. PDF xaqiijisan si degdeg ah.

features.title: Ku casuum QR code
features.desc: Abuur kulanka, darawalka kale wuxuu sawiraa QR ka taleefankiisa. Ma jiro rakibid, ma jiro diiwaangelin.

features.title: Sawirro, cod iyo saxiix
features.desc: Ku dar sawirro, ku dhawaaq aragtidaada, dhig gaadiidka khariidadda, oo saxiix farahaaga.

features.title: Fayl PDF waqtiga lagu xusay
features.desc: boom.contact waxay soo saartaa fayl PDF waqtiga lagu xusay oo ka kooban macluumaadka ay gelisay darawalka kasta.

features.title: Si loo gudbiyo caymiskaaga
features.desc: Soo dejiso PDF ama u dir email si aad ugu darto bayaankaaga shilka ee caymiskaaga.

legal.title: Heerka caalamiga ah
legal.text: PDF dhijitaalka ah ee boom.contact waxaa aqbalay shirkadaha caymiska 50+ wadan.

finalCta.title: Ma diyaar u tahay shil?
finalCta.subtitle: boom.contact dhig shaashadaada. 5 daqiiqo oo dhammaystira.

flow.label: Wax walba hal socod
flow.title: Laga bilaabo shilka ilaa fayl diyaar ah

stress.label: Loo fikiray waqtiga shilka
stress.title: Loo naqshadeeyay xaaladaha culus
stress.text: Kadib dhawaq, maskaxda ma cadda. boom.contact waxay horumarisaa talaabo talaabo, luqaddaada, waxayna kaydisaa dhammaan macluumaadka la ururiyey. Wax walba waxay ka shaqeeyaan biraawsarka taleefanka, xitaa xitaa xariir xadidan.
stress.emergencyText: boom.contact ma beddelayo gargaarka, booliska, qareenka ama caymiska. Haddii dhaawac ama khatar jirto, marka hore la xiriir adeegyada degdega.

pricing.label: Qiimaha
pricing.title: Fudud, hufan, aan lahayn rukhsad
pricing.caption: 1 deyn = 1 warbixin dhameystiran · luqado badan · deyn aan dhicin

b2b.label: Xirfadlayaasha
b2b.title: Wakiillo, dhaqdhaqaaqyo iyo lamaanayaasha caymiska
b2b.text: Ku qalabeey macaamiishaada iyo darawalladaada qalab cad oo loogu talagalay in lagu diiwaangeliyo shil iyo in la soo saaro fayl PDF waqtiga lagu xusay. Xirmooyinka deynta ee dhaqdhaqaaqyada iyo wakiillada, hawlgelin fudud, aan rukhsad lahayn.

items.title: Dhaqdhaqaaqyada
items.desc: Fayl nidaamsan oo loogu talagalay shil kasta oo darawal.

items.title: Wakiillo
items.desc: Adeeg qiimo leh oo loogu talagalay caymiskaaga.

items.title: Sir
items.desc: Xogta la sirgaxay inta lagu jiro, la tirtiri karo codsi.

items.title: Gudbinta
items.desc: Fayl PDF waqtiga lagu xusay oo diyaar u ah in lagu daro bayaanka shilka.

items.a: boom.contact waa codsi kaa caawinaysa in la diiwaangeliyo shil wadada laga bilaabo taleefanka: casuumida darawallada adoo adeegsanaya QR, sawirro, cod, khariidado, saxiixyo, ka dibna soo saar fayl PDF waqtiga lagu xusay si loogu diro caymiskaaga.

items.q: Ma u baahanahay inaan rakibo codsi?
items.a: Maya. boom.contact waxay si toos ah uga shaqeysaa biraawsarka taleefanka (Safari, Chrome, Firefox). Waxaad sidoo kale ku dari kartaa shaashaddaada guriga sida codsi web (PWA) si aad u hesho offline.

items.q: Maxaa dhacaya haddii darawalka kale uusan haysan codsiga?
items.a: Waxaad abuurtaa kulanka oo QR code ayaa soo baxaya. Darawalka kale wuxuu sawiraa taleefankiisa: boom.contact waxay ka furmaysaa biraawsarkiisa, iyada oo aan diiwaangelin ama soo dejin.

Faylka PDF waqtiga lagu xusay waxaa loogu talagalay in lagu daro bayaankaaga shilka. boom.contact ma dammaanad qaadayo aqbalaadiisa, taas oo ku xiran caymiskaaga iyadoo loo eegayo heshiiskaaga iyo sharciga.

items.q: Ma shaqeysaa haddii darawalka kale uu ku hadlo luqad kale?
items.a: Haa. Darawal kasta wuxuu isticmaalaa interface-ka luqaddiisa. Faylka ugu dambeeya waxaa lagu soo saaray darawal kasta.
Xogta waxaa la sirgaxay inta lagu jiro, kulamada si otomaatig ah ayaa loo tirtiraa ka dib waqti, booliska marna lama ogeysiiyo si otomaatig ah — kaliya ficil cad oo kaaga yimaada.
Laga bilaabo CHF / EUR 4.90 warbixin. Xirmo 3 warbixin ah 12.90 (−12 %), xirmo 10 ah 34.90 (−29 %). Ma jiraan rukhsado, deyn aan dhicin.

location.injury_desc_label: Sharaxaad (qayb jidh, xanuun, dhaawac la arko)
location.injury_footer: Dhaawac culus hadduu jiro wac 112 (EU) ama 144 (CH).
location.emergency_voluntary: Wacidahan ikhtiyaari ayay yihiin — booliska si toos ah laguma soo ogeysiin.

cgu.consent_cgu: Waxaan aqbalayaa Shuruudaha iyo Siyaasadda Sirta
cgu.consent_marketing: Waxaan u oggolaanayaa PEP's Swiss SA inay emailkayga u isticmaalaan adeegyada dheeraadka. Ikhtiyaari — waqtiga kasta la joojin karaa.
cgu.error_network: Khalad network. Dib u isku day.

cgu_sections.title: 1. Ujeeddada
cgu_sections.text: boom.contact waa adeeg dhijitaal ah oo ay samaysay PEP's Swiss SA. Waxay kaalmeysaa diyaarinta warbixinta shilka dhijitaalka caalamiga ah.

cgu_sections.title: 2. Aqbalitaanka
cgu_sections.text: Isticmaalka adeegga waxaa micnihiisu yahay aqbalitaanka shuruudaha. Isticmaal sharci darro ah waa mamnuuc.

cgu_sections.title: 3. Adeegyada
cgu_sections.text: boom.contact waxay bixisaa: (a) OCR; (b) Session QR; (c) Saxeexyo dhijitaal; (d) PDF email. Darawalku mas'uul u yahay inuu shirkadda caymiskiisa u soo warbixiyo.

cgu_sections.title: 4. Qiimaha
cgu_sections.text: Adeegga waxaa lagu iibinayaa xidmooyin. Lacag bixinta Stripe (PCI-DSS). Credits-ku waxay leeyihiin taariikhda dhamaadka.

cgu_sections.title: 5. Qiimaha sharci
cgu_sections.text: PDF-ka boom.contact waxaa aqbalay shirkadaha caymiska. PEP's Swiss SA kuma dammaanad qaabanayso aqbalitaanka dhammaan wadamada.

cgu_sections.title: 6. Mas'uuliyadda
cgu_sections.text: PEP's Swiss SA kama qaadato mas'uuliyadda khaladaadka OCR ama diidmada caymis. Mas'uuliyadda waxay ku xaddidan tahay lacagta la bixiyay.

cgu_sections.title: 7. Milkiilaha
cgu_sections.text: Software, calaamadaha, waxyaabaha boom.contact waa hantida PEP's Swiss SA.

cgu_sections.title: 8. Sharciga
cgu_sections.text: Sharciga Swiss ayaa dhaqan gala. Muran Maxkamadda Jura ayaa xaliya.

privacy_sections.title: Mas'uulka xogta
privacy_sections.text: PEP's Swiss SA, Bellevue 7, 2950 Courgenay, Jura, Suisse. privacy@boom.contact

privacy_sections.title: Xogta la uruuriyay
privacy_sections.text: Email, magac, ciwaanka, lambarka gaarka, GPS, saxeexa dhijitaalka, macluumaadka caymiska.

privacy_sections.title: Aasaaska sharci
privacy_sections.text: Fulinta heshiiska (Art. 6.1.b RGPD) xogta warbixinta. Ogolaanshaha isticmaalka ganacsiga.

privacy_sections.title: Mudada kaydinta
privacy_sections.text: Sessions: 2 saacadood. PDF iyo xog: 30 maalmood ka dibna la tirtiraa. Xogta lacag bixinta: 10 sano.

privacy_sections.title: La wadaagida xogta
privacy_sections.text: Xogta kuma iibsan partida saddexaad. Stripe, Resend, Anthropic adeegyada kaliya ayay u isticmaalaan.

privacy_sections.title: Xuquuqdaada
privacy_sections.text: Fiirin, wax ka beddel, tirtir, wareejin. U qor privacy@boom.contact.

signature.title: Saxiix
signature.waiting_pdf: Faylka PDF waxaa la soo saari doonaa marka labada dhinac ay saxiixaan.

intro.title: Ka hor inta aan la bilaabin
intro.body: boom.contact waxay kaa caawinaysaa inaad diiwaangeliso shil iyo inaad soo saarto fayl PDF nidaamsan. Haddii dhaawac, khatar, ka tagid, khilaaf weyn ama waajibaad sharci ah ay jiraan, si degdeg ah ula xiriir gargaarka, booliska ama hay'adaha ku habboon. Macluumaadka la bixiyay waxay ku jiraan mas'uuliyadda ka qaybgalayaasha. Waxaad si gacanta ah u gelin kartaa macluumaadka haddii aadan rabin inaad isticmaasho kamarad, makarafoon ama goob.

guest_accept.checkbox: Waxaan aqbalayaa Shuruudaha adeegga iyo waxaan akhriyay Siyaasadda Asturnaanta.
guest_accept.note: Waxaan fahamsanahay in macluumaadkayga loo isticmaali doono in lagu soo saaro faylka PDF shilka iyo in macluumaadka la bixiyay ay ku jiraan mas'uuliyaddayda.

legal.signature_confirm: Waxaan xaqiijinayaa in macluumaadka aan bixiyay ay sax yihiin sida aan u garanayo waxaanan aqbalayaa in saxiixaygu lagu daro faylka PDF.
legal.payment_notice: Markaad sii wado lacag bixinta, waxaad fahamsan tahay in lacag bixintu ay daboolayso soo saarista iyo dirista faylka PDF. Macluumaadka la bixiyay waxay ku jiraan mas'uuliyadda ka qaybgalayaasha.
legal.mic_notice: Markaad isticmaasho makarafoonka, bayaankaaga codka waxaa la falanqeyn doonaa si loogu daro faylka shilka. Waxaad isticmaali kartaa gelinta qoraalka halkii.

injury_confirm.body: Sawirrada dhaawacyadu waxay ka koobnaan karaan xog xasaasi ah. Fadlan hubi inaad haysato ogolaanshaha qofka la xiriira, marka laga reebo haddii ay jirto baahi amni ama waajibaad sharci ah.

legal.pdf_ready_title: Fayl PDF shil waqtiga lagu xusay
legal.pdf_ready_body: Saxiixyada loo baahan yahay waa la diiwaangeliyay. Faylka PDF waa diyaar. Fadlan hubi macluumaadka ka hor inta aanad u dirin caymiskaaga.

postConstat.or_skip: ama si toos ah u bood

postConstat.scenario_child: Carruurtaada ayaa wacaysa — shil. U dir warbixin 3 ilbiriqsi gudaheed taleefankiisa.
postConstat.scenario_employee: Shaqaalaha leh gaadiid shirkad. Si degdeg ah ugu wareeji deyn adoo adeegsanaya WhatsApp.
postConstat.scenario_friend: Saaxiib dhibaato ku jira dibadda. Wuxuu helayaa xiriir, ma jiro akoon loo baahan yahay.
postConstat.ready_subtitle: Hadda dib u soo celi, wadaag marka aad rabto
postConstat.account_desc: Gaadiidkaaga ayaa la xasuusan doonaa. Markaad shil kale gasho, waxaad si toos ah u bilaabi doontaa talaabada QR — wax gelin ah, wax sawir ah.
postConstat.gift_desc: Hal deyn oo ka mid ah = xiriir gaar ah oo loo diro qof kasta, iyada oo aan qofka u baahnayn akoon.
postConstat.wa_gift_desc: Hal guji, u dir xiriir carruurtaada, shaqaalahaaga ama saaxiibkaaga. Wuxuu sameeyaa warbixintiisa adoon akoon ama lacag bixin — laga jaray deyntaada.
postConstat.gift_link_created: ✅ Xiriir la sameeyay — u dir WhatsApp!
postConstat.share_desc: Waxaad hadda sameysay warbixintaada 5 daqiiqo. Saaxiibadaa waxay mudan yihiin inay ogaadaan in ay jiraan.
postConstat.memorize_desc: Dhaqdhaqaaqyada shirkadda, mooto, baabuurka camping? Gaadiid kasta oo la sawiray = marna ma gelin marka shil dhaco.
postConstat.recharge_desc: Hadda dib u soo celi oo ka faa'iidayso qiimo dhimis xirmooyinka qoyska iyo shirkadda.

keepReport.title: Kaydso nuqulkaaga
keepReport.body: Abuur akoonkaaga bilaashka ah hal guji: warbixintaadu waxay ahaan doontaa mid la heli karo, waxaadna diyaar u tahay shil kasta oo xiga.
keepReport.sentBody: Fur xiriirka la helay si aad u dhaqaajiso akoonkaaga — warbixintaadu halkaas ayay ku jiri doontaa.
keepReport.error: Diridu way fashilantay. Fadlan isku day mar kale daqiiqad gudaheed.
